title: Deleting Apps
drDigitalIntro:
Delete apps you don't use to free up space.
• The app is removed, but your data may be saved in the cloud.
• You can reinstall a free app anytime at no cost.
• Paid apps reinstall free from the same account.

playgroundTask.goal: You deleted an app you no longer need

steps.say: Go to My Apps to see your installed apps.
Find Puzzle Quest and click the Delete button next to it.

drDigitalSuccess: You deleted an app! You can always reinstall it for free from the store later.
drDigitalHint: Go to My Apps, find the app you want to remove, and click the Delete (trash) button.
